title: Echani fiber armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Echanifiber.png|thumb|[[Mission Vao]] in Echani fiber armor.|150px|right]]
'''Echani fiber armor''' was a type of light body [[Armor/Legends|armor]] worn by many elite [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] martial artists during the days of the [[Old Sith Wars]],<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> centuries before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==History==
By the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]], Echani fiber armor proved to be a highly versatile suit of armor and this along with the ease by which it could be modified made it popular among many professional soldiers and bounty hunters.<ref name="KOTOR" />

In [[3956 BBY]], a friend of [[Gilthos Uksaris]], the manager of [[the Twisted Rancor Trio]], delivered a suit of Echani fiber armor to him at an [[Lower City Apartments|apartment]] in the [[Lower City]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. Though Uksaris was not around to immediately receive it, the friend had secured the package in a [[Footlocker/Legends|footlocker]] protected by a [[Holo-Sec Corp]] [[Holo-Sec Corp anti-theft explosive|anti-theft explosive]] and its complementing holographic security system.<ref name="KOTOR" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
Before Uksaris arrived to retrieve the fiber armor, however, the mind-wiped former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] cracked the security system and took the armor for his own use.<ref name="KOTOR" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Echani fiber armor first appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. If the player fully upgrades the armor, it provides the highest protection available to them during the events on Taris.

As is the case with many role-playing video games, robbing Uksaris' room does not affect the player's alignment.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
